body.title: Probe: create /tmp/igor_validation_probe.txt with 'hello' then remove it
body.result: Probe ticket served its purpose; dispatch adopted it, pe_chain pre-flight escalated; see T-worker-dispatch-validation for full outcome
body.test_plan: Probe passes when /tmp/igor_validation_probe.txt is written with 'hello' and subsequently deleted. Ticket itself is the e2e test; the real assertion lives in T-worker-dispatch-validation.
body.description: Test-only probe for T-worker-dispatch-validation. In /tmp/igor_validation_probe.txt write exactly 'hello' then delete the file. Done when file was created and then removed. Touches only /tmp — zero production impact.
